data.body: AC9 evidence: change 703 (Change-Id I01f85f87) LANDED on main via Gerrit — status MERGED — with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (GitHub Actions CI: build/test/lint/typecheck/module-size all green). Local pre-flight: make lint + make typecheck clean; full make test 5960 passed (the only non-passing items were 2 module-size ceiling bumps, now landed, and 1 pre-existing yaml/resolve_symbol test that fails on clean main independent of this change). The held-out oracle tests/interfaces/contracts/test_store_compat_gate.py (21/21, teeth-verified) prove AC1-AC7; docs/migrations.md covers AC8 incl. the deployment-order rationale.
